data.content: Convert my project at simple-single-project/MyApp/MyApp.csproj to use Central Package Management.
data.transformedContent:
<current_datetime>2026-05-08T00:58:09.299Z</current_datetime>

Convert my project at simple-single-project/MyApp/MyApp.csproj to use Central Package Management.

input.initialPrompt: Convert my project at simple-single-project/MyApp/MyApp.csproj to use Central Package Management.

data.reasoningText:
The user wants to convert a .NET project to use Central Package Management (CPM). This involves:
1. Looking at the current project file to see what package references exist
2. Creating a `Directory.Packages.props` file with the package versions
3. Removing version attributes from the project's `PackageReference` items

Let me first look at the project file.

2.   <PropertyGroup>
3.     <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
4.   </PropertyGroup>
5.   <ItemGroup>
6.     <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging" Version="9.0.0" />
7.     <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" Version="9.0.0" />
8.     <PackageReference Include="Polly" Version="8.5.0" />
9.   </ItemGroup>
10. </Project>
11.

data.content: Now I'll create the `Directory.Packages.props` file and update the project file to remove versions:

arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging" Version="9.0.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Polly" Version="8.5.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="9.0.0" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

data.content:
Done. Here's what I did:

1. **Created `simple-single-project/Directory.Packages.props`** — defines centralized versions for all packages with `ManagePackageVersionsCentrally` enabled.

2. **Updated `MyApp.csproj`** — removed `Version` attributes from all `<PackageReference>` items.

Package versions are now managed centrally:
| Package | Version |
|---------|---------|
| Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Polly | 8.5.0 |
| System.Text.Json | 9.0.0 |
